releases.author: blorbb
releases.description:
Fix #10 syntax error in older versions due to using a very new browser feature [Duplicate names in different disjunction alternatives](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Regular_expressions/Named_capturing_group#browser_compatibility)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/blorbb/obsidian-blockier/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: blorbb
releases.description:
A few features and fixes!

- Added #8 select all when activating Select block twice (actually when the selection doesn't change, but basically the same).
- Fixed up #7 some more
- Select block at the start of a code block fence with a language will only select the language.
- Minified the build so it should load faster!

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/blorbb/obsidian-blockier/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

releases.author: blorbb
releases.description:
Added setting to select an entire code block's contents with the Select block command.

Also fixed selection in a table cell, it will now select the entire table cell (like regular Ctrl-A) instead of doing nothing.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/blorbb/obsidian-blockier/compare/1.0.3...1.1.0

releases.author: blorbb
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* allow 0 or 1 space after `>` for callout suggestion by @blorbb in https://github.com/blorbb/obsidian-blockier/pull/6


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/blorbb/obsidian-blockier/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3

releases.author: blorbb
releases.description:
Adds back the Select block command and allows users to configure the hotkey: https://github.com/blorbb/obsidian-blockier/pull/4

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/blorbb/obsidian-blockier/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: blorbb
releases.description: use `keymap.of` instead of command hotkeys or event listeners, to work in different contexts or multiple windows.

releases.author: blorbb
releases.description:
Features:
- Select block
- Block edit
- Checkbox/callout suggestions
releases.name: Blockier initial release
